stories.title: Run 30-day pipeline for all 6 channels
stories.description: Run scripts/run_channel_30d_single.py for sampro, itgod, kimjakgatv, hsacademy, sosumonkey, syuka with window_days=30
acceptanceCriteria: output/{slug}_30d_*.json exists with today's timestamp for all 6 channels
Each output JSON contains 'videos' array and 'cross_video_ranking'
Dashboard HTML/md generated for each channel

stories.title: Generate cross-channel comparison report
stories.description: Run comparison across all 6 channels to produce unified comparison artifact
acceptanceCriteria: channel_comparison_30d_*.json exists in output/ with today's date

stories.title: Regenerate DASHBOARD.md
stories.description: Run scripts/generate_dashboard.py to update DASHBOARD.md with all 6 channels' latest data
acceptanceCriteria: DASHBOARD.md updated with data from all 6 channels

stories.title: Test, commit, and push
stories.description: Run pytest --no-cov, commit all changes, push to remote
acceptanceCriteria: All output files and changes committed
